goal: Screenshot this blueprints gallery page. Describe the CARD IMAGES/VISUALS specifically: do the blueprint cards now have branded colored icons/illustrations instead of dark gradient placeholders? What do you see in the image area of the top 3 cards? Rate the blueprints page /10.

action.criteria: Examine the blueprint cards on this page. Do they have branded colored icons/illustrations in the image area, or are they dark gradient placeholders? What specific visuals appear in the top 3 cards? Assess the overall visual design quality of the blueprints gallery.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a screenshot showing the blueprints gallery page with visible card images that I can analyze and describe in detail
